about.title: Why Next.js is the best React framework for production
about.p1: Next.js extends React to provide a production-ready framework that is optimized for performance and developer experience. It offers the best of both worlds: static and dynamic rendering. Each page can be pre-rendered on the server as static HTML or be rendered dynamically on the fly. This ensures blazingly fast page load times and excellent search engine optimization (SEO), as search engine bots can easily crawl and index the content.
about.p2: Beyond that, Next.js comes with a suite of features that accelerate development and improve maintainability. File-based routing simplifies URL management, API Routes make it easy to build backend endpoints, and Fast Refresh provides instant feedback during development. Features like automatic image optimization and code splitting ensure that applications are as performant as possible without manual configuration. Built and maintained by Vercel, Next.js is the trusted choice for enterprise-grade React applications.
